candidates.database_description: Storm-surge and sea-level-rise hazard data showing coastal inundation areas for different return periods and future sea-level scenarios. Useful for coastal flood exposure analysis and scenario-based hazard assessment.

Building and cadastral building data from Matrikkelen, including building points (representasjonspunkt), building type, building number, current building status, municipality attributes, and identifiers for linking buildings to addresses and properties.
Flood hazard susceptibility data showing areas with potential flood risk. Suitable for first-pass flood exposure analysis, municipality-level planning, and spatial overlay with buildings and parcels.
Flood zone data showing inundation areas for specific flood return periods such as 20-year, 200-year, and 1000-year flood scenarios. Useful for scenario-based flood analysis and flood-risk filtering.
Quick clay hazard zone data, including hazard classes, consequence classes, and risk classes for areas with potential large quick-clay landslides.

tool_calls.name: {"databaseName": "flomsoner", "schemaName": "flomsoner_76d14d5fe2fd4a29bfffc266fdcdd820", "table_name": "flomareal", "columns": [{"column_name": "objid", "data_type": "integer"}, {"column_name": "objtype", "data_type": "text"}, {"column_name": "omrade", "data_type": "USER-DEFINED"}, {"column_name": "versjonid", "data_type": "text"}, {"column_name": "datafangstdato", "data_type": "timestamp with time zone"}, {"column_name": "oppdateringsdato", "data_type": "timestamp with time zone"}, {"column_name": "sluttdato", "data_type": "timestamp with time zone"}, {"column_name": "datauttaksdato", "data_type": "timestamp with time zone"}, {"column_name": "opphav", "data_type": "text"}, {"column_name": "opphavsniva", "data_type": "integer"}, {"column_name": "flomfarekategori", "data_type": "text"}, {"column_name": "flomfarekategori_nvdb", "data_type": "text"}, {"column_name": "flomsonetype", "data_type": "text"}, {"column_name": "gjentaksintervall", "data_type": "integer"}, {"column_name": "analyseomrade", "data_type": "text"}, {"column_name": "hoydereferanse", "data_type": "text"}, {"column_name": "malemetode", "data_type": "text"}, {"column_name": "malemetodehoyde", "data_type": "text"}, {"column_name": "kvalitetskontrollert", "data_type": "boolean"}, {"column_name": "statuskartlegging", "data_type": "text"}]}]﴾Based on the discovery, I will now emit the plan to identify the five municipalities in Finnmark county with the highest number of buildings in 200-year flood zones. This requires the following steps in a **multi_db** workflow, as data resides in separate databases (`kommuner`, `matrikkelenbygning`, and `flomsoner`): 1) Query Finnmark municipalities, 2) Query buildings, 3) Query 200-year flood zones, 4) Spatial join buildings with flood zones, 5) Aggregate by municipality, and 6) Sort and limit results.

planned_steps.purpose: Retrieve all municipalities in Finnmark county for spatial filtering.
Retrieve all buildings in Finnmark municipalities.
Retrieve 200-year flood zones in Finnmark municipalities.
Join buildings within 200-year flood zones.
Join municipality names to building-flood zone results.
Count buildings in flood zones per municipality.
Sort municipalities by building count descending.
Limit to top 5 municipalities.
